title: dalbergaria lanata
intro: Dalbergaria lanata, also known as Dalbergia lanata, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is a deciduous tree that grows in tropical regions and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dalbergaria lanata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, among other uses. Herbal preparations of Dalbergaria lanata often involve making teas or infusions from its leaves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
